examples: Billy: Wow! Filet Mignon! Peking Duck! Lobster!
Guest: Yes. bring me a bottle of wine and filet steak.
They feasted us on filet mignon and strawberry shortcake.
Atop this mixture was placed a cod filet, pan seared until the skin is crispy.
The VIP platter includes tastes of sake-marinated filet mignon, curry shrimp tempura and bacon-wrapped chicken.
